message:
test(audio): add metamorphic tests for audio processing invariants

Adds 14 metamorphic tests verifying audio transformation properties
without requiring an oracle for "correct" output:

MR Categories:
- Volume scaling (multiplicative): RMS/peak scale linearly with factor
- Silence padding (additive): prepend/append preserve original content
- Resampling (invertive): round-trip recovers signal, same-rate is identity
- Concatenation (inclusive): length/peak/RMS obey composition laws
- Noise addition (bounded): low-level noise preserves RMS approximately

Composite test chains: scale → pad → concat

These tests catch regressions in audio normalization without needing
reference transcription outputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
